# `api.jobs.payment.get_create`

> `GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/payment/create` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.payment.get_create(job_display_id: int) -> PaymentInfo
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs payment get_create <job_display_id>
```

``GET /job/{jobDisplayId}/payment/create``

## Response

Returns `PaymentInfo`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `totalAmount` | `Optional[float]` | no | Job total |
| `balanceDue` | `Optional[float]` | no | Remaining balance |
| `paymentStatus` | `Optional[str]` | no | Current status |
| `payments` | `Optional[list[dict]]` | no | Payment history |
